code:
import io
import string
import list

fn b_at(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
while i < n
  mut skipping = true
  while skipping and i < n
    if is_ws(b_at(input, i))
      i = i + 1
    else
      skipping = false
    end
  end
  if i < n
    mut j = i
    mut at_ws = false
    while j < n and not at_ws
      if is_ws(b_at(input, j))
        at_ws = true
      else
        j = j + 1
      end
    end
    let token = string.substring(input, i, j)
    match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(v)
      nums = list.push(nums, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = j
  end
end

mut unique: List<Int> = []
mut k = 0
while k < nums.len()
  match nums.get(k)
  when Some(x)
    if not list.contains(unique, x)
      unique = list.push(unique, x)
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  k = k + 1
end

mut sorted: List<Int> = []
mut p = 0
while p < unique.len()
  match unique.get(p)
  when Some(x)
    mut new_sorted: List<Int> = []
    mut inserted = false
    mut q = 0
    while q < sorted.len()
      match sorted.get(q)
      when Some(y)
        if not inserted and x < y
          new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, x)
          inserted = true
        end
        new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, y)
      when None
        ()
      end
      q = q + 1
    end
    if not inserted
      new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, x)
    end
    sorted = new_sorted
  when None
    ()
  end
  p = p + 1
end

mut output = ""
mut r = 0
while r < sorted.len()
  match sorted.get(r)
  when Some(v)
    if r == 0
      output = "#{v}"
    else
      output = "#{output} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  r = r + 1
end
println(output)
